title: astragalus bisulcatus var. major
intro: Astragalus bisulcatus var. major, also known as the bitterroot, is a perennial plant in the legume family native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Astragalus bisulcatus var. major can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with medications.
